about_text.value: No secret endings. Moral constitutions compete over short arc routing.

characters.name: District Steward
characters.description: Carries care, fairness, and trust pressure.

text_script.value: A live crisis forces hard tradeoffs between duty, care, truth, loyalty, fairness, and harm.
hold procedure
Opening Crisis: process holds; harm falls; trust cools.
Opening Crisis: precedent hardens and exceptions narrow.
shield vulnerable
Opening Crisis: people-first shield; fairness blurs.
Opening Crisis: relief granted; procedure debt grows.
open facts
Opening Crisis: full disclosure; short rupture, long clarity.
Opening Crisis: record opens and alliances crack.

Care and bonds govern first response.
Mercy leads but procedure floor remains.
